picks.quote: Arman beat Charles already... I don't think he'll lose to Charles.
I do think BSD is probably going to get the win in that fight... BSD gets the win. If he if Patty can't put him on his back foot, he's going to lose
if he does not have the the black belt level of jiu-jitsu to keep DDP on his back, DDP is going to pop back up... DDP is bigger.

the easy game plan to me would be put IM Gary on the fence because you're not going to outstrike him probably and you're not going to have you're going to have a hard time taking him down... if you get underneath Makachev, your chances of getting up are low.
